name: intervention_id
description: Bridge-generated UUID for this intervention record (deduplication key)

name: user_id
description: Opaque GCP churn-predictor user identifier (matches prediction_logs.user_id)

name: osint_entity_id
description: OSINT entity UUID from user_entity_map (stored as text for BQ compatibility)

name: entity_type
description: OSINT entity category (e.g. HNWI, Investor, Founder, Corporate, Politician)

name: entity_name
description: OSINT entity display name; null if not present in entity_base

name: entity_confidence
description: Link confidence score from user_entity_map (0.0 to 1.0)

name: link_method
description: How the GCP user was linked to the OSINT entity (email, name_fuzzy, linkedin_url, external_id, manual)

name: churn_risk_score
description: Churn probability score from the predictor (0.001 to 0.999)

name: label
description: Churn risk tier: high_risk (>=0.7), medium_risk (>=0.4), low_risk (<0.4)

name: recommended_action
description: Recommended intervention action derived from entity_type via ENTITY_ACTION_MAP

name: model_version
description: Predictor model version string at time of prediction

name: request_id
description: Predictor request UUID that generated the high-risk event triggering this enrichment

name: enrichment_source
description: Enrichment pipeline version tag (e.g. osint_v1) for lineage tracking

name: pubsub_message_id
description: Pub/Sub message ID from the churn-high-risk topic delivery; useful for deduplication and audit

name: predicted_at
description: UTC timestamp when the churn prediction was made (from predictor event payload)

name: intervention_date
description: Date of intervention in UTC (partition key) — same-day as enriched_at

name: enriched_at
description: UTC timestamp when the OSINT bridge wrote this row
